RECYCLING FUND For Fiscal Year 2009/10 a: Authorizing Statute:  Estabished under Section 706 of the Municipal Waste Planning, Recycling and Waste Reduction Act (Act 101 of 1988)

Sources of income:  Recycling Fee - $2 per ton fee imposed on every ton of municipal solid waste that is accepted for disposal or processing at landfills or resource recovery facilities in the commonwealth.
Use of money:  Funds are used for Recycling Development and Implementation Grants and program funding, which include staffing of 2 complement positions and related costs.
All personnel related expenditures to include salaries, wages, overtime
Meetings, IT equipment & supplies, auto supplies, leases, maintenance, vehicle fuel, travel and training related travel, other miscellaneous services & supplies

Unnamed: 6: New recycling methods and train-the-trainer program
Misc. operating supplies, mntc. and services, DGS/OA/IES charges, etc.
Replacement of various older non-compliant devices
